system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against Poison TN
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You meditate, slowing down your breath and blood flow to stave off the effects of poison. If you Succeed you slow down the lethality rate of the poison for 1 hour per Rank of Neigong. It reduces lethality by one increment (so a poison that kills in minutes takes hours to kill). On a Total Success the rate reduces two increments (minutes become days). You must meditate for one complete hour, during which time you manage to halt the progress of the poison. Cathartic: This does the same thing as the normal version but it lasts for 12 hours per Rank of Neigong. Cathartic drains one point of your Qi for each use for 12 hours.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must meditate for one complete hour, during which time you manage to halt the progress of the poison.
system.catharticEffect: This does the same thing as the normal version but it lasts for 12 hours per Rank of Neigong. Cathartic drains one point of your Qi for each use for 12 hours.
